settings.heading: Submit your wholesale inquiry.
settings.intro: Share the details needed for review: product scope, quantity, destination, timeline, and intended use.

settings.heading: Choose the pathway closest to your purchase.
settings.intro: The more specific the use case, quantity, destination, and timeline, the more useful the review can be.

settings.heading: Request pricing with the information a B2B supplier actually needs.
settings.intro: A quote request should include product category, quantity, budget, destination ZIP code, timeline, buyer type, and whether comparable substitutes are acceptable.
